name: tft-bot
description: TFT auto-play bot: Rust core + Python RL (SB3 PPO)

scripts.rl:m1: cargo build -p agent-cli --release && cd python && python -m tft_bot_rl.train_ppo --total-steps 100000 --agent-cli ../target/release/agent-cli.exe && python -m tft_bot_rl.eval_baselines --seeds 32 --agent-cli ../target/release/agent-cli.exe --ppo-model artifacts/ppo_tft.zip --output artifacts/eval/m1-report.json
scripts.check:all: npm run cargo:fmt && npm run cargo:clippy && npm run cargo:test
